programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

A wedding weekend turns into a real-life whodunnit when the vacation rental's host vanishes without a trace and the more than 20 guests staying at the property instantly become potential suspects in a murder investigation.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: Bloomberg Next Africa A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Rob the Mob
programme.desc: While robbing a mob-owned hangout, two lovers (Michael Pitt, Nina Arianda) stumble upon a secret that could help the FBI dismantle New York's crime syndicate.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: Scientist Karen Ross (Laura Linney) is sent by her father-in-law, mogul R.B. Travis (Joe Don Baker), to the Congo to determine the whereabouts of his son's missing diamond-hunting team. Led by expert guide Kelly (Ernie Hudson), Ross and a mismatched search party -- including primatologist Dr. Peter Elliot (Dylan Walsh), treasure hunter Herkermer Homolka (Tim Curry) and a gorilla -- discover a danger far more sinister than anything they expected to find, even in the heart of the jungle.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Jerry Shaw (Shia LaBeouf) and Rachel Holloman (Michelle Monaghan) are two strangers whose lives are suddenly thrown into turmoil by a mysterious woman they have never met. Threatening their lives and family, the unseen caller uses everyday technology to control their actions and push them into increasing danger. As events escalate, Jerry and Rachel become the country's most-wanted fugitives and must figure out what is happening to them.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Crooked cops on the take -- small-time drug lords -- sleazy informers and sadistic rich kids ready to kill --- for police detective John Shaft, its just another night in the underbelly of New York City, another shift facing down cops and criminals who want him dead and a legal system that thrives on money, not justice.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandmother's funeral, hotel manager Lisa Reisert is waiting to fly back home when she meets charming Jackson Rippner at check-in. She thinks it luck that they're seated together on the plane, but soon learns otherwise. Jackson hopes to assassinate the head of Homeland Security, but to do so, he needs Lisa to reassign the official's room number at her hotel. As insurance, Jackson has kidnapped Lisa's father.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: Nominated for 8 Academy Awards®. An unexpected bond forms between a formerly institutionalized man (Bradley Cooper) and a woman recovering from her own tragedy (Jennifer Lawrence).

programme.title: American Hustle

programme.title: Freejack
programme.desc: Bounty hunters from the future transport a doomed race car driver to New York City in 2009, where his mind will be replaced with that of a dead billionaire.

programme.title: Shark Attack
programme.desc: When marine biologist Steven McKray (Casper Van Dien) learns that a friend died in a mysterious shark attack in South Africa, he decides to find out what really happened. Upon arriving in the village, he meets Lawrence Rhodes (Ernie Hudson), a local hotel owner, and scientist Miles Craven (Bentley Mitchum), who informs Steven of the mysterious increase in shark attacks in the area. When Steven teams up with his late friend's sister for a fact-finding dive, they make a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: After a big storm damages their remote research facility, they must fight for their lives as the sharks hunt them down, one by one.

programme.title: San Andreas
programme.desc: After the San Andreas Fault triggered a magnitude 9 earthquake, a rescue helicopter pilot and his estranged wife make their way to San Francisco to save their only daughter.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Little Women (1994)
programme.desc: Jo struggles for independence and sometimes clashes with her beloved mother and sisters Meg, Amy and Beth. She also contends with their cranky Aunt March, their impulsive neighbor Laurie and kindly linguistics professor Friedrich Bhaer.

programme.title: Lovely & Amazing
programme.desc: A finely observed comedy, "Lovely & Amazing" is an intimate family portrait of four hapless but resilient women and the bittersweet lessons they learn in keeping up with the hectic demands of their individual neuroses. Each of the women seeks redemption in her own haphazard way, but whatever salvation they find is illusory and short-lived.

programme.title: Stuck in Love
programme.desc: A successful writer (Greg Kinnear) tries to reconnect with his two children (Lily Collins, Nat Wolff) after his divorce.

programme.title: Cross Creek
programme.desc: In the late 1920s, columnist Marjorie Kinnan Rawlings (Mary Steenburgen) moved to Cross Creek, Fla., to dedicate herself to writing a serious novel. Despite her husband's eventual departure, the initial suspicion of the locals about her work, and the challenge of finding a worthy subject to devote herself to, Marjorie persists in her dream. With the inspiration of kindly Marsh Turner (Rip Torn) and his daughter, Ellie (Dana Hill), Marjorie discovers the perfect theme for her novel.

programme.title: Love on Ice
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Former figure skating champion gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory.

programme.title: Pumpkin Everything
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amy returns home to care for her grandfather and his fall-themed store.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered

programme.desc: Recently married Avery discovers husband Alex has another wife, Melanie.

programme.title: I Was Honey Boo Boo
programme.desc: Alana Thompson, famously known as "Honey Boo Boo," narrates this Lifetime biopic.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: Showcasing how "Octomom" overcame overwhelming odds to raise her children.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: After rising through the ranks of her male-dominated profession, idealistic FBI agent Kate Macer receives a top assignment. Recruited by mysterious government official Matt Graver, Kate joins a task force for the escalating war against drugs. Led by the intense and shadowy Alejandro, the team travels back-and-forth across the U.S.-Mexican border, using one cartel boss to flush out a bigger one.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Outlaw Ben Wade (Russell Crowe) terrorizes 1800s Arizona, especially the Southern Railroad, until he is finally captured. Wade must be brought to trial, so Dan Evans (Christian Bale), the owner of a drought-stricken ranch, volunteers to escort him to the train. Along the trail, a grudging respect forms between the men, but danger looms at every turn, and the criminal's men are in pursuit.

programme.title: The Impossible
programme.desc: A couple and their three sons encounter terror, courage and compassion following the December 2004 tsunami that devastated Thailand.

programme.title: All Is Lost
programme.desc: During a solo voyage in the Indian Ocean, a veteran mariner (Robert Redford) awakes to find his vessel taking on water after a collision with a stray shipping container. With his radio and navigation equipment disabled, he sails unknowingly into a violent storm and barely escapes with his life. With any luck, the ocean currents may carry him into a shipping lane -- but, with supplies dwindling and the sharks circling, the sailor is forced to face his own mortality.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Clockstoppers
programme.desc: A teenager (Jesse Bradford) accidentally activates a wristwatch that allows him to make time stand still.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romance-challenged tv producer meets a TV personality who claims to know what makes the sexes tick.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: A day in the life of an American family that has come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest.

programme.title: 50 To 1
programme.desc: A group of cowboys head out on a journey when their racehorse qualifies for the Kentucky Derby.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: A young couple discovers a cache of drugs in a sunken war ship and must run from the gangsters who stashed it.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Sweet-natured Alice Sycamore (Jean Arthur) falls for banker's son Tony Kirby (James Stewart). But when she invites her snooty prospective in-laws to dinner to give their blessing to the marriage, Alice's peculiar extended family -- including philosophical grandfather Martin Vanderhof (Lionel Barrymore), hapless fledgling ballerina sister Essie (Ann Miller) and fireworks enthusiast father, Paul (Samuel S. Hinds) -- might be too eccentric for the staid Kirbys.

programme.title: The Awful Truth
programme.desc: Jerry (Cary Grant) and Lucy (Irene Dunne) are a married couple who doubt each other's fidelity: Jerry suspects Lucy and her music teacher (Alexander D'Arcy) of spending an evening together, and Lucy is convinced Jerry lied about a business trip. When the jealous pair file for divorce, both rush into new relationships, but quickly realize their love never died. The soon-to-be-divorced husband and wife then both scramble to spoil each other's chances for newfound romance.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: The life of Prince Hamlet of Denmark (Nicol Williamson) is thrown into disarray when he learns that his father was murdered by his uncle Claudius (Anthony Hopkins), the current king, who is now married to Hamlet's mother, Gertrude (Judy Parfitt). Hamlet's unstable behavior troubles his love, Ophelia (Marianne Faithfull), who is further shaken by the death of her father, Polonius (Mark Dignam). Hamlet methodically plots vengeance while other forces conspire to attack him.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: Johnny (Cary Grant) seems like a solid match for Julia (Doris Nolan), the socialite daughter of Edward Seton (Henry Kolker). Assured that Johnny is a worthy suitor, Edward approves of the pairing. But, as Johnny's wanderlust surfaces -- he is more interested in traveling than in business -- Edward starts to have doubts. Johnny also begins to wonder if he might not be a better match for Linda (Katharine Hepburn), Julia's outspoken younger sister, with whom he has much more in common.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Three-time male model of the year, Derek Zoolander, is devastated when he loses the title to newbie Hansel. After the news, Mugatu's fashion empire brainwashes Derek into being an assassin.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: When the world's most beautiful people are in danger, former models Derek and Hansel are recruited for a top secret mission to defeat the criminal mastermind Mugatu. Prepare for a dangerously sexy adventure where looks really can kill.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: Orange County
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: 'Night, Mother
programme.desc: Jessie Cates (Sissy Spacek) packs her belongings into bags intended for donation to charity. She's doing so because, as she tells her mother, Thelma (Anne Bancroft), she plans to kill herself that very evening. This film, inspired by an esteemed stage production, centers on the interactions between an elderly woman and her daughter, whose depression has pushed her to the brink of suicide. As Jessie steels herself for her last act, Thelma gallantly encourages her to opt for life.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: In the mid 1960s, suburban New York teenager Ron Kovic (Tom Cruise) enlists in the Marines, fulfilling what he sees as his patriotic duty. During his second tour in Vietnam, he accidentally kills a fellow soldier during a retreat and later becomes permanently paralyzed in battle. Returning home to an uncaring Veterans Administration bureaucracy and to people on both sides of the political divide who don't understand what he went through, Kovic becomes an impassioned critic of the war.

programme.title: Lorenzo's Oil
programme.desc: True-life drama of a father and mother who battled against the odds to save their son's life. Augusto and Michaela Odone are dealt a cruel blow by fate: five-year-old Lorenzo is diagnosed with a rare and incurable disease, but the Odones' persistence and faith leads to the cure which saves their boy and re-writes medical history.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon (Robert De Niro) who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side-effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: The Infiltrator
programme.desc: In 1986, federal agent Robert Mazur (Bryan Cranston) goes under cover to infiltrate the trafficking network of Colombian drug kingpin Pablo Escobar. Working with fellow agents Kathy Ertz (Diane Kruger) and Emir Abreu (John Leguizamo), Mazur poses as a slick, money-laundering businessman named Bob Musella. Gaining the confidence of Roberto Alcaino (Benjamin Bratt), Escobar's top lieutenant, Mazur must navigate a vicious criminal underworld where one wrong move could cost him everything.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Moments in Spacetime
programme.desc: A woman must care for her grandfather who is suffering from dementia.

programme.title: Courage
programme.desc: Jason Priestley stars in this inspirational adventure story about courage, love and the power of family.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: A scattered marketing exec helps rebrand a bootcamp and discovers its strict owner may be just what she needs.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Door to the Night
programme.desc: Jong-Sub is diagnosed with colon cancer and tries to hire a caregiver. A woman named Yeon-Hwa comes to him.

programme.title: Origin of Monogamy
programme.desc: To cure Sun-Ae's misandry mental counselor Sung-hae intentionally lets her junior Sun-Ae to meet a man.

programme.title: Wet Dream
programme.desc: Jin-hee scarred by loss and loneliness finds healing and true love with a man who cherishes her selflessly.

programme.title: One Win (Dubbed)
programme.desc: With a career win rate below 10%, disgraced former volleyball star Woo-jin coaches a collapsing women's pro team, chasing a single impossible win for a massive reward.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Springtime (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Young-min, in order to get money for his sick daughter's surgery, carries out a hit against his gang member Heo-gang. But when his boss Bae-san refuses to pay him for the hit, Young-min murders his boss. Soon, the police try to arrest him, but Doo-hyun, aka the legendary goblin, takes the blame instead. Released after 10 years, Doo-hyun seeks out the detective who ruined his life, and hears that Young-min has taken his place as the goblin…

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother's honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

programme.title: Demon Time
programme.desc: After inheriting his father's massive debt, a man is thrust into danger that could cost him his life.

programme.title: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: Malcolm and Sofia decide the only way to get back at rival graffiti artists who ruined their latest masterpiece is to tag the Home Run Apple of the New York Mets.

programme.title: Bloodline of the Jewel
programme.desc: Bride to be, Nahdulay Ncala's world is turned upside down as she finds herself in the middle of a dangerous quest for a royal jewel. Traveling from Africa to America, Nahdulay connects with an unsuspecting driver who helps her uncover the truth.

programme.title: Carmen and Magic
programme.desc: When Carmen meets a new friend at school named Magic, she helps raise her spirits and allows her to stand up for herself. When her single father Drew starts seeing the school principal, Magic convinces Carmen to disrupt their relationship, pulling the veil on Magic's sinister nature.

programme.title: Indian Uprising
programme.desc: Montgomery plays a captain trying to keep the peace between famed Chief Geronimo and the local white settlers.

programme.desc: After a card shark is caught cheating, he is taken out and lynched by the drunkards he was playing against. Soon afterwards, the men who were in the lynch mob start being murdered, one after another all by hanging.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: Short Rope for a Tall Man

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whisky salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: Bad Girls

programme.desc: A new personality appears in Do Hyun — this time, that of a young child — leaving him shocked. Meanwhile, Se Gi drags Ri Jin off to somewhere unknown.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.5
programme.desc: Se Gi, who has kidnapped Ri Jin, asks her to make Do Hyun disappear forever. Director Ahn begins tracking their whereabouts. Meanwhile, Do Hyun ends up at Ri On's house, and Ri On introduces him to his family as “Mr. Perry.”

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.6
programme.desc: Do Hyun can't stop thinking about Ri Jin, which only fuels Se Gi's jealousy. Eventually, Se Gi warns him, “If you touch my woman, yours will be in danger.” Provoked, Do Hyun goes to Ri Jin and asks her to become his secret personal doctor.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.7
programme.desc: Tae Im questions Director Ahn about the reason for Do Hyun's return to Korea, leaving him flustered. Ri Jin struggles to stop Yo Seob from taking his own life. Hwa Ran orders someone to find Min Seo Yeon's long-lost child, while Do Hyun begins strategizing to meet the mysterious writer Omega.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.8
programme.desc: Gi Joon proposes to Chae Yeon, but she gets angry at his attitude. Ri Jin agrees to be Do Hyun's secret doctor, but is shocked to learn she has to live in the same house as him. Thus begins their uneasy and awkward cohabitation.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.9
programme.desc: Ri Jin encounters all of Do Hyun's personalities in one night — except for Shin Se Gi. Gi Joon and Chae Yeon are stunned when Ri Jin shows up at the company as Do Hyun's secretary, while Ri On meets Do Hyun under his secret identity as Writer Omega.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.19
programme.desc: Claiming she has no lingering attachment, Jeongi leaves the Bunwon behind, and Gwanghae watches her go in hollow disbelief. After returning to her former home, Jeongi and Taedo are suddenly seized by military officers, who drag Taedo away. Gwanghae pleads with Inbin to release him, insisting that Taedo once served as his personal guard. Awakened by her mother Yeonok's voice, Jeongi rises and walks toward the kiln…

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.20
programme.desc: King Seonjo orders Gwanghae, Imhae, and Shinseong to find a way to end the people's widespread stomach illness, prompting Gwanghae to disguise himself and investigate in secret. While surveying the village, he unexpectedly encounters Jeongi, who is making and distributing bowls to the villagers. Jeongi carefully presents a vessel she crafted especially for Gwanghae. Soon, a royal decree is issued for the Bunwon to produce pottery for the common people, and Gwanghae sets out to find Jeongi.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.21
programme.desc: Despite Taedo's warnings that it is dangerous, Jeongi insists she must remain at the Bunwon to bring Gangcheon down from his nangcheong post. Reunited with Jeongi at the workshop, Gwanghae cannot hide his quiet delight. Meanwhile, Yukdo grows uneasy when he is forced to compete with Jeongi to create the lid for King Seonjo's cherished jar. He promises Jeongi that if she succeeds, he will elevate her to the rank of master potter.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.22
programme.desc: When King Seonjo selects Yukdo's lid, Yukdo struggles to contain his joy, while Jeongi graciously acknowledges his skill. Gwanghae petitions the king to lift the Chief Scholar's exile, but Seonjo misinterprets the request as a threat to royal authority. Seizing the moment, Inbin plots to frame Gwanghae for treason by forging his letter. As Jeongi departs on Gangcheon's errand to mine white clay, Gwanghae mounts his horse and races after her.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.23
programme.desc: Upon returning to the palace, Gwanghae insists that the letter King Seonjo presents to him has been forged—but the king refuses to believe it. Jeongi is shaken when Imhae warns her that anyone tied to the alleged treason will not escape unscathed. When Jeongi meets Gwanghae, she vows to restrain even her own feelings so as not to become a burden to him. Court Lady Gukbi is stunned to learn that Jeongi is Yeonok's daughter.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.24
programme.desc: After uncovering the full truth, Jeongi begins searching for a way to bring about Gangcheon's downfall, with Taedo pledging to help her. When Jeongi and Gwanghae cross paths at the Bunwon, they share a tender, wordless gaze filled with longing. Upon discovering a ledger detailing Gangcheon's bribes, Jeongi resolves to win Royal Consort Inbin's favor. Meanwhile, Hwa-ryeong decides to eliminate Son Haengsu.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.2
programme.desc: Yoon promises to fully support ViVi Cosmetics if their Miss Korea wins, so Hyung Joon, Hong Sam, and Kang Woo search for beautiful women they know. Ji Young takes Director Ma's business card and visits Queen Beauty Salon.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.3
programme.desc: Under Director Ma's guidance, Jae Hee undergoes special training to become Miss Korea, satisfying Director Ma with her excellent skills. Oh Ji Young and Kim Hyung Joon decide to participate in the Miss Korea pageant with different motives, first preparing for the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant'. Director Ma attends the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant' as a judge, where Ji Young is scheduled to compete.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.4
programme.desc: Yoon offers Ji Young to be her 'sponsor', and Ji Young leaves in indignation and a sense of betrayal towards Hyung Joon. Teacher Jung tries to get money from Hyung Joon's mother but is flustered by her formidable demeanor. After many twists and turns, Ji Young steps onto the stage for the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant'.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.5
programme.desc: Ji Young leaves the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant' venue holding Director Ma's hand, and Teacher Jung tries to stop Director Ma. However, Director Ma firmly takes Ji Young and leaves the venue. Ji Young quits her department store job and begins training with Jae Hee and Director Ma's other candidates.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.6
programme.desc: Ji Young's family opposes her participation in 'Miss Korea'. Director Ma calmly begins to persuade the family. However, when the topic of 'breast augmentation surgery' comes up, the family and Hyung Joon strongly oppose it even more. Teacher Jung secretly takes samples of ViVi Cream to Kim Kang Shik of BaDa Cosmetics to negotiate.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.7
programme.desc: Ji Young, along with the ViVi Cosmetics members including Hyung Joon, begins serious 'Miss Korea' training. Meanwhile, Director Ma and Director Yang are surprised by the news that the Miss Korea pageant might not be held due to the IMF crisis.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: What would you do if you were confronted with death? What gives someone the strength to survive? Is it luck, chance, instinct? In a stripped-down, simple-yet-cinematic interview style, I SURVIVED allows survivors to explain, in their own words, how they overcame unbelievable circumstances -- offering insight into what got them through an experience that changed their lives forever. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Surf N Turk: Wisconsin Turkey and Carp
programme.desc: Steven Rinella scratches his spring turkey itch this year as he visits Southeast Wisconsin to call in some big eastern Toms with his buddy Jerod Fink. The guys also plan to do some bow fishing after dark so they can enjoy a real Midwest turkey and fish fry.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Best Start - Wild Game Breakfast Cooking Special
programme.desc: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day, but is often overlooked by wild game cooks at home. Following a series of successful hunts across North America this past fall, Steve demonstrates how to cook a variety of breakfast classics using wild game ingredients‚Äîincluding black bear bacon, which Steve has never tried before.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: The West Texas desert has a way of pulling you in. In Desert Ghost, Will Cooper heads west to Marathon, Texas, with longtime friend and mentor Cody Roberts to hunt aoudad in one of the most remote landscapes in the state. Rooted in family legacy, this film explores Cody's deep ties to the desert, the story behind Desert Ghost Distillery, and the mystique of a western oasis near Big Bend National Park. More than a hunt, Desert Ghost dives into the role of aoudad management and its importance to desert bighorn sheep conservation efforts led by Texas Parks and Wildlife and the Wild Sheep Foundation. Sometimes, to protect what belongs here — you have to chase the ghosts. You really do have to be tough, determined, or one lucky bastard to make it out in West Texas.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.sub-title: The WoodHaven Way - "Hunting a 10 1/2 YEAR OLD BUCK
programme.desc: After years of chasing one of the oldest and most elusive bucks he's ever encountered, Phillip Vanderpool uses the WoodHaven Initmidator grunt call to finally gets his shot at Tinman, a legendary 10.5-year-old buck in Kansas.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike is back after em in Alabama and finally finds a tone that this ol gobbler seems to like. Some timely calling and waiting patiently for this longbeard and his hen to make their way to his setup pays off. Back to work Mike, we have calls to make! It's the WoodHaven Way!

programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "The hunting heritage of South Africa
programme.desc: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.

programme.title: Spring Thunder

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: For decades, Paul Butski has set the standard in turkey calling. His name is etched into the NWTF Grand National Calling Championships Hall of Fame, and his influence stretches far beyond the stage. He didn't just win competitions, he shaped the way we talk to turkeys – and more importantly, the way we hunt them.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: After their friend Billy (Anthony Starr) dies, Tom (Dax Shepard), Jerry (Matthew Lillard) and Dan (Seth Green) go on a camping trip to honor his memory. The campsite, however, has special significance. Billy believed famous airplane hijacker D.B. Cooper hid money in the area, and his friends aim to find it. Unfortunately, they are not prepared for the adventure. After falling over a waterfall, they are left to the mercy of wild animals and a harsh wilderness terrain.

programme.title: Eurotrip
programme.desc: After a brutal breakup at a high-school graduation party, lovelorn Ohio teen Scott Thomas (Scott Mechlowicz) goes on a quest across Europe to find his sexy German pen pal, Mieke (Jessica Boehrs). Joining him are his brainless buddy (Jacob Pitts) and a pair of twins (Travis Wester, Michelle Trachtenberg) they meet up with in Paris. Scott's quest does not turn out to be easy, however, and the backpackers become embroiled in many farcical situations as they hop from country to country.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: In an ensemble film about easy money, greed, manipulation and bad driving, a Las Vegas casino tycoon entertains his wealthiest high rollers -- a group that will bet on anything -- by pitting six ordinary people against each other in a wild dash for $2 million jammed into a locker hundreds of miles away. The tycoon and his wealthy friends monitor each racer's every move to keep track of their favorites. The only rule in this race is that there are no rules.

programme.title: Road Trip: Beer Pong
programme.desc: Even though he has a new girlfriend, Andy (Preston Jones) can't stop thinking about his old high school love, Jenna (Julia Levy-Boeken), who dumped him and went on to become a high-profile beer pong model. When he learns Jenna is on tour with a beer pong tournament, he and his friend, Arash (Danny Pudi), decide to go on on a road trip and follow them. After a series of misunderstandings and several encounters with the law, Andy and Arash catch up with Jenna and the tournament.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie: The Girl Who Never Had a Birthday
programme.desc: While Tony distracts Dr. Bellows, Roger taps into the NASA computer again. He finds the answer, but before he can tell Jeannie her birthday, he is shipped off to Alaska. Tony throws Jeannie a party anyway.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Home Improvement Tim "The Toolman" Taylor, host of the home-improvement show "Tool Time," definitely is not as handy at home as he is on screen. He and his wife, Jill, raise three boys who are racing toward adulthood. The Taylor family often relies on next-door neighbor Wilson, who provides unconventional wisdom and perspective to the Taylors' personal and familial crises.

programme.title: That '80s Show
programme.desc: That '80s Show A group of 20-somethings navigates through San Diego in the midst of the trends and politics of the 1980s. Stereotypically, the punks, the material girls, the yuppies and the Madonna wannabes all hang together and find reasons to frequent a record store run by a former groupie. Regular characters on the show include struggling musician Corey Howard, punk-rocker June Tuesday and Corey's father, R.T., who is representative of the decade's mentality of buying oneself extravagant gifts and having an excessive lifestyle.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: Just for Laughs Gags The Just for Laughs Festival has been a staple of the Canadian comedy scene for more than 30 years. Now, the festival lends its famous name to this hidden-camera prank show starring a Quebec-based troupe. Canada is the stage and its inhabitants are the characters -- some might say victims -- for the "Candid Camera"-style pranks featured on the half-hour series. Although the pranks last just a few minutes each, that's just long enough to inflict embarrassment on the subjects of the pranks.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Glen Tickle apologizes for his last name, explains the things only professional comedians have time for, and tells all the stories hes only allowed to tell on stage.

programme.title: Nick Arnette: Boomers and Hipsters
programme.desc: LA comic, Nick Arnette, riffs on starting to date grandmas, his border exchange policy, and why Baby Boomers are the coolest generation.

programme.title: Lamuweri Guluka
programme.desc: Lamuweri Guluka is an African name meaning “hard to pronounce on the first try.” Lam is a seasoned comedian who has performed at colleges, comedy clubs, and cafes all over the country whose background as a nerdy, suburban, black male gives him a unique comedic perspective that audiences love.

programme.title: Scott Long
programme.desc: Scott Long tosses out sharp and clever lines that remind you of the differences between funny people and true comedic artists.

programme.title: Will Marfori
programme.desc: Will Marfori has appeared on the Late, Late Show with Craig Ferguson and is a regular on Sirius/XM Satellite radio. Performing at comedy clubs, colleges, and cruise ships, Will tours almost 50 weeks a year all around the world. Born with Cerebral Palsy, Will never felt like he fit in until he walked on stage for the first time in 1999. He started doing comedy in Norfolk, Virginia while attending Old Dominion University. He entered a stand-up comedy contest for the student body and won. He was hooked. Poking fun at his situation was empowering and it felt good to share his comedy with other people. In 2001 Will graduated from ODU and got a job working as a house MC at the Comedy Zone in Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Myq Kaplan
programme.desc: Brilliant and rapid-fire, Myq Kaplan's comedy expounds on bathroom stall etiquette, grammar obsessed grandmas, and the real world applications of board games.

programme.title: Erica Rhodes
programme.desc: Erica Rhodes is a regular panelist on Comedy Central's @midnight and Fox's Punchline. She has made appearances on SeeSo's The Guest List, Hulu's Coming to the Stage, AXS' Live at Gotham and the syndicated Comics Unleashed. Erica has performed at San Francisco Sketchfest, the Moontower Comedy Festival (Austin, TX), the Blue Whale Comedy Festival (Tulsa, OK), the Boston Comedy Festival and RIOT LA Fest. Recent TV credits include ABC's Modern Family, HBO's Veep, Fox's New Girl, and IFC's Comedy Bang Bang. Erica stars in Audible's Dr. Katz: The Audio Files and ABC Digital's The Off Season. She recurs on TruTV's Fameless and has been a semi-regular performer/writer on NPR's A Prairie Home Companion.

programme.title: Andrew Sleighter
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Kortney Shane Williams
programme.desc: The master of satire has been a part of The Bridgetown Comedy Festival, Boston Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull Comedy Festival, and Bumbershoot Arts festival. Kortney's self-deprecating humor has won him finalist spots in both Comedy Central's South Beach Comedy Festival Competition and NBC's Stand-Up Showcase.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: In this original version of iconic game show "Family Feud," actor Richard Dawson plays host to two teams, each comprised of five family members, who try to match the answers given to survey questions asked to groups of people (typically 100 people in the group). The family that wins the game by being the first to reach a certain point total, either 200 or 300 depending on the rules at the time, advances to the bonus round, called Fast Money, for a chance to win thousands of dollars by answering more survey questions.

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Dipsy hug and run off to watch some children making some fancy dress clothes. A crown appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky wears the crown he becomes King Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky sings a song about his bag and it appears. Dipsy sings a song about his hat and it appears. Laa-Laa sings a song about her ball and it appears. Po sings a song about a cloud and it appears. When the cloud begins to rain, Po runs away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children perform a Maori Song. In Teletubbyland, Po sings a lovely song. Gradually the other Teletubbies join in, until they sing a lovely song together. The Teletubbies love to sing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.desc: Are you up for an adventure of a lifetime? Get ready as everyone's favorite purple dinosaur Barney and his dino-pals are simply out to have some fun! The children try to build a pretend farm, but have a hard time working together.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Rainbow Dash and Pinkie Pie go on a mission to find out if A. K. Yearling is retiring from writing books.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Mane Thing About You
programme.desc: Rarity's shampoo is accidentally switched with Zecora's magical remover potion.

programme.desc: Fluttershy makes a new friend. / Fluttershy protects her friends from Bubbles' dark side.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer has been avoiding her friendship lessons with Twilight Sparkle.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Applejack, Rarity and Pinkie Pie all return from a boat trip angry at each other.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Apple Bloom tells a white lie to make cover up a mistake.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Rainbow Dash and Twilight Sparkle are sent to the Wonderbolt Academy to help two friends solve a problem.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: To Where And Back Again Part 1
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer assembles an unlikely team of heroes to defend Equestria.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: Bad Thing No. 3 Part 1 / Bad Thing No. 3 Part 2
programme.desc: Rarity tries to get rid of her bad luck. / Rarity receives some much-needed advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: Pinkie Pie: Hyper Helper Part 1 / Pinkie Pie: Hyper Helper Part 2
programme.desc: Pinkie Pie prepares for the final round of the Royal Jelly Juggernaut. / Pinkie Pie enters the final round.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: To Where And Back Again Part 2
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer leads an unlikely squad of rescuers against one of the ponies' oldest and greatest foes.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle agonizes over Starlight Glimmer's future and seeks advice from Princess Celestia.

programme.title: Dance Puppy Dance
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time. She goes to comic lengths to get some peace so she can compose the song she's suppose to write for the Queen of Berryvania.

programme.title: The Berry Big Harvest
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store. Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

programme.title: Playback
programme.desc: Ghost Girl, a bounty hunter who works for SOL Technologies, holds an interview with two reporters recounting all the events that have transpired concerning the evil Knights of Hanoi and the mysterious Playmaker.

programme.title: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Girl challenges Yusaku to a Speed Duel with some heavy stakes. If she wins, she gets to capture Ai. If Yusaku wins, he gets a window into SOL's server to learn more about the incident that still haunts him.

programme.title: The Berry Big Harvest
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store. Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Don't Forget the Leaves!
programme.desc: Sid and his friends investigate and discover that leaves are food for animals, they provide shade, and they help make nutrients so flowers and trees can grow!

programme.title: The Bug Club
programme.desc: Sid and his friends use their magnifying glasses and discover ants, rolie polies, and caterpillars around the playground.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball

They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend

programme.title: Rev and Roll

But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Stella And Sam
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Kids Planet
programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Robocar Poli
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
