programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's

Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.desc: Carmelo queda encerrado probando la alarma del negocio. María sueña que debe ganarse el corazón de Doña Lucha para conquistar a Albertano, y para eso prepara unos deliciosos chiles, aunque esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María quiere celebrar su fiesta de quince años, pero para eso utiliza dinero que no es suyo. Doña Lucha entrena al Chino para ser chambelán. Albertano se ofrece a ser el chambelán de María.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido recibe una llamada del papá de Gaby quien lo amenaza diciéndole que sí su hija no regresa en 24 horas a su casa, quedará despedido. Plutarco le dice a su padre que no permitirá que su esposa se vaya, así que decide renunciar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido no logra conseguir trabajo y tiene tres meses de renta atrasados. Martina piensa cómo conseguir dinero para pagar la escuela. Plácido se disfraza de pordiosero para conseguir dinero el dinero de la renta.

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El padre de Diego habla con él pidiéndole que no ayude a Alma, ya que ahora su carrera política está en lo alto, mientras que el director es despedido.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León ensucia el agua del colegio para poder comprarlo. Roger se hace el enfermo para que Roberta lo cuide.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Esmeralda

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Adrián rechaza a Graciela y ella toma tranquilizantes. Fátima le pide a Adrián que vaya a ver a Graciela, pues sus últimos momentos se avecinan.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: El último respiro de Graciela es para Adrián. Fátima se siente responsable por la muerte de su hija y se hunde en una depresión. Álvaro advierte a Esmeralda de las intenciones de José Armando y esta acude a verlo.

programme.title: Esmeralda

programme.title: Esmeralda

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.sub-title: Más vale poco y bueno, que mucho y malo
programme.desc: La pobre de María padece una grave enfermedad. Sin embargo, en su corazón no existe lugar para el dolor.

programme.sub-title: Ama a quien no te ama, responde a quien no te llama, y andarás carrera vana
programme.desc: Isa es una adolescente que está dispuesta a todo por amor, incluso a someterse al abuso y a la humillación. Ella se enamora de Gabriel, un chico irresponsable y grosero que la utiliza solo para que le haga sus trabajos de escuela.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: No es lo mismo, pero es igual

programme.sub-title: Para mentir y comer pescado hay que tener cuidado
programme.desc: Las mentiras de Samuel perjudican a la psicóloga de su escuela, ya que hacen que el novio de ésta, muerto de celos, provoque una tragedia.

programme.desc: Desde que murió su madre, Lili fue criada por su abuela, y por no escuchar sus consejos, se aprovecharán de su inocencia.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Fentanilo la nueva apuesta del narco
programme.desc: México es país productor y de tránsito de Fentanilo, un opioide sintético cada vez más consumido en Estados Unidos. Esta droga causa muchas muertes entre jóvenes. Un kilo de fentanilo genera las mismas ganancias que una tonelada de cocaína.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desesperados por encontrar una cura para la terrible enfermedad de su hija, una pareja aceptó ser parte de un experimento y arriesgarse a las consecuencias.

programme.desc: La muerte de la soldado Vanessa Guillén ha provocado un movimiento nacional para hablar sobre un tema incómodo, la violencia sexual contra las mujeres en las fuerzas armadas dutrante años, los abusos contra ellas han sido una epidemia sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: McCoy Tyner, Avery Sharpe & Louis Hayes
programme.sub-title: McCoy Tyner Trio live at Estival Lugano
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. McCoy Tyner's first main exposure came with Benny Golson, being the first pianist in Golson's and Art Farmer's Jazztet. He's also known for his work with the John Coltrane Quartet. Tyner's style is easily comparable to Coltrane's maximalist style of saxophone. Though a member of Coltrane's group, he was never overshadowed by the saxophonist, but complemented and even inspired Coltrane's open-minded approach. McCoy Tyner is considered one of the most influential jazz pianists of the 20th century, an honour he earned both with Coltrane and in his years of performing following Coltrane's death.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: Michael Brecker Band
programme.sub-title: Michael Brecker Band - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, decorated American saxophonist and composer Michael Brecker and his band played at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Accompanied by bassist Jeff Andrews, drummer Adam Nussbaum, pianist Joey Calderazzo, and guitarist Mike Stern, Brecker displayed his virtuosity in spades.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Bobby McFerrin
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual, open-air music festival that takes place over five days in the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. In 1985, American vocal virtuoso Bobby McFerrin took the stage solo at Estival Jazz Lugano. The one-man musical force stunned the audience with his unique vocal percussion as he delved into the crowd for this quirky and charming act.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: China Moses, Joe Armon Jones & Luke Wynter
programme.sub-title: China Moses: 'Whatever' at Jazz à Ramatuelle
programme.desc: In 1988, Dee Dee Bridgewater was one of the first great jazz singers to perform at the Jazz Festival in Ramatuelle. In 2016, the story seems to repeat itself as her daughter China Moses took the stage at Ramatuelle. Over the years, China Moses has become a mature performer with a unique style: rocky voice, sharp sense of swing, and intense/energetic stage presence. After signing compilations dedicated to Dinah Washington and blues, Moses released in 2016 an album of his own compositions, entitled "Whatever". Get ready for a most entertaining performance combining jazz, soul, and hip-hop.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Ron Carter
programme.desc: Ron Carter, Bobby Hutcherson and Joe Chambers are legends of Blue Note Records. They have established themselves as forward-thinking and inventive band leaders, composers and studio musicians, astonishing audiences around the world with their creativity and technical versatility.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: The Rückert-Lieder are a collection of five art songs by Mahler, set to poems by Friedrich Rückert, showcasing his gift for intimate and deeply personal musical expression in a style that balances simplicity with profound emotional complexity, often exploring themes of nature, loss, and transcendence. The songs offer a rare glimpse into Mahler's soul, revealing a deep sensitivity and the gift of expressing complex human feelings with an exquisite and seemingly simple musical beauty.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: Mahler's Symphony No. 6 is a monumental work exploring deep personal tragedy, incorporating a unique, famous "hammer" blows that symbolize the inevitable blows of fate. This symphony's intense emotional power, epic scope, and the composer's eventual wrestling with fate and personal loss make it an unforgettable, profoundly moving experience for audiences.

programme.title: Andrea Bacchetti
programme.desc: At the age of eleven, Italian pianist Andrea Bacchetti (*1977) debuted with Italian chamber orchestra I Solisti Veneti under the baton of Claudio Scimone. He performed on international festivals and in prestigious concert halls worldwide. Besides, he appeared with several renowned orchestras such as Lucerne Festival Strings, Camerata Salzburg, and Prague Chamber Orchestra. In the current recital, Bacchetti performs J. S. Bach's celebrated Goldberg Variations, BWV 988. Completed in 1741, the work is named after German harpsichordist Johann Gottlieb Goldberg, who might have been the first to have performed the work. Bach's masterpiece consists of an aria and a set of thirty variations. Rather than writing variations on the aria's melody, Bach used the accompanying bass line as his starting point. This performance was recorded at Theater Carlo Felice in Genoa, Italy, on April 13, 2015.

programme.title: Lesley Garrett, Wiener Akademie, Alfred Eschwe & David Charles Abell
programme.desc: A Night in Vienna recreates the magical atmosphere of 19th century Viennese ballrooms. In the breathtaking surroundings of Vienna's Hofburg Palace, the Wiener Akademie period orchestra, conducted by Alfred Eschwe, plays some of the Strauss family's and Joseph Lanner's favorite pieces, including "The Beautiful Blue Danube", "Tritsch-Tratsch-Polka", and the "Radetzky March". Former residence of the Habsburg dynasty, the Hofburg contained the apartments of Emperor Franz Joseph and Empress Elizabeth. A Night in Vienna features soloist Lesley Garrett, the most popular soprano from the UK. The spirit of the Strauss era is perfectly recreated by the addition of waltz dancers adorned with historical costumes. This concert was presented in 2004, under the direction of David Amphlett.

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik.
